violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. - Staff did not wash hands prior to gloving.
General food protection. — --Food item was not protected from potential contamination. - Lettuce had container of sour cream in it. Removed.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. - Seal on crock-pot is coming off of lid, lid is also bent.--Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. - Handles on prep cooler and reach in freezer online are broken- need repair. - Door and seals broken on reach-in freezer in storage area.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Handles on equipment needs to be cleaned in kitchen and in storage room - Microwave needs cleaned - Prep cooler needs cleaned - Bottom on reach-in cooler needs to be cleaned or crumbs--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Carpeting was installed as floor covering where not allowed. - Carpet in storage area

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors in walk-in found dirty. - Walls in kitchen found dirty.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Titles missing in kitchen area
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
